steps.title: Contrast umami intensity
steps.content: The student wants a difference between winged kelp and arame. The relevant notes say participants rated winged kelp's umami as moderate and arame's umami as high.

steps.title: Avoid shared traits
steps.content: A only says both are brown seaweed. B says both contain umami and adds unrelated foods. D groups them together as seaweeds that trigger umami. The useful sentence contrasts moderate winged kelp with more intense arame. The answer is C.
